creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Wed Oct 16 00:31:43 2013
New Revision: 330465
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/330465

Log:
  - Update from 2.10.2 to 2.10.3 [1]
  - Update MASTER_SITES [1]
  - Improve COMMENT
  - Add stage support
  
  PR:		ports/182992
  Submitted by:	mitsururike@gmail.com (maintainer) [1]
  Approved by:	wg/culot (mentors, implicit)

Modified:
  head/lang/scala/Makefile
  head/lang/scala/distinfo

Modified: head/lang/scala/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/scala/Makefile	Wed Oct 16 00:17:01 2013	(r330464)
+++ head/lang/scala/Makefile	Wed Oct 16 00:31:43 2013	(r330465)
@@ -2,13 +2,13 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	scala
-PORTVERSION=	2.10.2
+PORTVERSION=	2.10.3
 CATEGORIES=	lang java
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.scala-lang.org/downloads/distrib/files/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.scala-lang.org/files/archive/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
 MAINTAINER=	mitsururike@gmail.com
-COMMENT=	The Scala Programming Language
+COMMENT=	Scala Programming Language
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
 LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/doc/LICENSE
@@ -30,41 +30,39 @@ SCALA_BINS=	fsc \
 		scaladoc \
 		scalap
 
-MAN1=		${SCALA_BINS:S,$,.1,}
+SCALA_MANS=	${SCALA_BINS:S,$,.1,}
+PLIST_FILES=	${SCALA_BINS:S,^,bin/,} \
+	man/man1/fsc.1.gz \
+	man/man1/scala.1.gz \
+	man/man1/scalac.1.gz \
+	man/man1/scaladoc.1.gz \
+	man/man1/scalap.1.gz
 
-PLIST_FILES=	${SCALA_BINS:S,^,bin/,}
 PORTDATA=	*
 PORTDOCS=	*
 PORTEXAMPLES=	*
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 pre-patch:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "Installation settings:"
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "   SCALA_HOME:    ${SCALA_HOME}"
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
 do-install:
-	@${MKDIR} ${SCALA_HOME}/bin
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${SCALA_HOME}/bin
 .for f in ${SCALA_BINS}
-	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/${f} ${SCALA_HOME}/bin/${f}
-	@${LN} -s ${SCALA_HOME}/bin/${f} ${PREFIX}/bin/${f}
+	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/${f} ${STAGEDIR}${SCALA_HOME}/bin/${f}
+	@${LN} -s ${SCALA_HOME}/bin/${f} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/${f}
 .endfor
 .for d in ${SCALA_SHRDIRS}
-	@cd ${WRKSRC}/${d} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${SCALA_HOME}/${d}
+	@cd ${WRKSRC}/${d} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${SCALA_HOME}/${d}
 .endfor
-.for m in ${MAN1}
-	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/man1/${m} ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1/${m}
+.for m in ${SCALA_MANS}
+	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/man1/${m} ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1/${m}
 .endfor
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .for d in ${SCALA_DOCDIRS}
-	@cd ${WRKSRC}/doc/${d} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${DOCSDIR}/${d}
+	@cd ${WRKSRC}/doc/${d} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/${d}
 .endfor
-.endif
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
-	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
-	@cd ${WRKSRC}/examples && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${EXAMPLESDIR}
-.endif
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
+	@cd ${WRKSRC}/examples && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/lang/scala/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/scala/distinfo	Wed Oct 16 00:17:01 2013	(r330464)
+++ head/lang/scala/distinfo	Wed Oct 16 00:31:43 2013	(r330465)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (scala-2.10.2.tgz) = f693fdbc4944a40a080866593c70c14253fca2f553a0c50a26c8c52c489666a3
-SIZE (scala-2.10.2.tgz) = 30463932
+SHA256 (scala-2.10.3.tgz) = 25d1ee0e8b3a2d3ba25e697d3f9647b30bbac9b78d922de3ce3d37cfcb484c99
+SIZE (scala-2.10.3.tgz) = 30531249
